Flexible mode with bottom legend

Source: R/flex_mode.R
flex_mode_b.Rd

Flexible mode with legend at bottom.

Usage

flex_mode_b(
  text_size = 11,
  text_family = "",
  text_face = "plain",
  text_colour = lightness[1],
  title_size = ggplot2::rel(1.1),
  title_family = text_family,
  title_face = "bold",
  title_colour = text_colour,
  subtitle_size = ggplot2::rel(1),
  subtitle_family = text_family,
  subtitle_face = text_face,
  subtitle_colour = text_colour,
  caption_size = ggplot2::rel(0.85),
  caption_family = text_family,
  caption_face = text_face,
  caption_colour = scales::alpha(text_colour, 0.75),
  caption_hjust = 0,
  axis_line_colour = lightness[2],
  axis_line_linewidth = linewidthness[1],
  axis_ticks_colour = axis_line_colour,
  axis_ticks_linewidth = axis_line_linewidth,
  axis_ticks_length_x_pt = text_size/3,
  axis_ticks_length_y_pt = text_size/4,
  panel_grid_colour = lightness[3],
  panel_grid_linewidth = linewidthness[2],
  panel_background_fill = lightness[4],
  plot_background_fill = lightness[5],
  legend_background_fill = plot_background_fill,
  legend_key_fill = plot_background_fill,
  ...
)

Arguments

text_size

The size of the text theme element.

text_family

The family of the text theme element.

text_face

The face of the text theme element.

text_colour

The colour of the text theme element.

title_size

The size of the plot.title theme element.

title_family

The family of the plot.title theme element.

title_face

The face of the plot.title theme element.

title_colour

The colour of the plot.title theme element.

subtitle_size

The size of the plot.subtitle theme element.

subtitle_family

The family of the plot.subtitle theme element.

subtitle_face

The face of the plot.subtitle theme element.

subtitle_colour

The colour of the plot.subtitle theme element.

caption_size

The size of the plot.caption theme element.

caption_family

The family of the plot.caption theme element.

caption_face

The face of the plot.caption theme element.

caption_colour

The colour of the plot.caption theme element.

caption_hjust

The horizontal adjustment of the plot.caption theme element.

axis_line_colour

The colour of the axis.line theme element.

axis_line_linewidth

The linewidth of the axis.line theme element.

axis_ticks_colour

The colour of the axis.ticks theme element.

axis_ticks_linewidth

The linewidth of the axis.ticks theme element.

axis_ticks_length_x_pt

The length of the axis.ticks.length.x theme element in points.

panel_grid_colour

The colour of the panel.grid theme element.

panel_grid_linewidth

The linewidth of the panel.grid theme element.

panel_background_fill

The fill (and colour) of the panel.background theme element.

plot_background_fill

The fill (and colour) of the plot.background theme element.

legend_background_fill

The fill (and colour) of the legend.background theme element.

legend_key_fill

The fill (and colour) of the legend.key theme element.

...

Provided to support trailing commas only.

Value

A ggplot theme.

On this page
